plugins.name: agency-core
plugins.description: Shared MCP data connectors — GitHub, Vercel, Figma, Linear, Playwright, Context7, and Next.js DevTools. Install first so agents and vertical plugins can reach your tooling.

plugins.name: web-development
plugins.description: Delivery skills for frontend work — implement tasks against design.md and tasks.md, code review with acceptance-criteria and design-drift checks, and create merge requests.

plugins.name: frontend-engineer
plugins.description: Agentic frontend engineer — React/Next.js App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind, Base UI. Builds and maintains UI and client state, reading the target repo's AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md before changing anything.
